items.prompt: What did Tobias ask about the registration fee?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Tobias ask about the registration fee?
items.answer: he asked whether the fee covered all sessions.

items.prompt: What did Priya ask about the museum tour?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Priya ask about the museum tour?
items.answer: Priya wondered how long the guided tour usually lasts.

items.prompt: What did Yasmin want to know about the dorm rules?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Yasmin want to know about the dorm rules?
items.answer: she was unsure whether guests could stay overnight.

items.prompt: Where did Damian put the lab notebook?
items.prompt_task_text: Where did Damian put the lab notebook?
items.answer: I have no idea where he placed the lab notebook.

items.prompt: What did Camille ask about the deadline change?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Camille ask about the deadline change?
items.answer: Camille asked whether the deadline had been formally announced.

items.prompt: Did Felix submit his physics homework on time?
items.prompt_task_text: Did Felix submit his physics homework on time?
items.answer: Felix has not turned in the homework as of this morning.

items.prompt: Why did Naomi miss the deadline last week?
items.prompt_task_text: Why did Naomi miss the deadline last week?
items.answer: she had not realized the form needed two signatures.

items.prompt: Your brother recommended a café near the library.
items.prompt_task_text: Your brother recommended a café near the library.
items.answer: the café my brother recommended became my favorite study spot.

items.prompt: Imani said the new library wing feels quieter.
items.prompt_task_text: Imani said the new library wing feels quieter.
items.answer: this study room feels much warmer than the old basement.

items.prompt: Matthew's bicycle has been making strange noises lately.
items.prompt_task_text: Matthew's bicycle has been making strange noises lately.
items.answer: Matthew is taking the broken bicycle to the campus repair shop.

items.prompt: What did Professor Lin ask about the lab equipment?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Professor Lin ask about the lab equipment?
items.answer: Professor Lin asked whether the microscopes would be replaced soon.

items.prompt: Where does Margot prefer to study during finals?
items.prompt_task_text: Where does Margot prefer to study during finals?
items.answer: Margot wondered where the quietest corner of the library was.

items.prompt: Did Inez confirm the museum hours for this weekend?
items.prompt_task_text: Did Inez confirm the museum hours for this weekend?
items.answer: I asked whether the museum still offered weekend discounts.

items.prompt: Have you seen the announcement about parking changes?
items.prompt_task_text: Have you seen the announcement about parking changes?
items.answer: the new parking permits have not been distributed yet.

items.prompt: What did Rafael mention about the textbook?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Rafael mention about the textbook?
items.answer: Rafael returned the textbook he had borrowed last semester.

items.prompt: When will the new bus route start operating?
items.prompt_task_text: When will the new bus route start operating?
items.answer: the campus transit office confirmed when the new route opens.

items.prompt: Did Sasha decide where to spend her winter break?
items.prompt_task_text: Did Sasha decide where to spend her winter break?
items.answer: Sasha has not decided where to spend her winter break.

items.prompt: Why was Lena confused by the lab instructions?
items.prompt_task_text: Why was Lena confused by the lab instructions?
items.answer: she could not remember whether the solution should be heated first.

items.prompt: Olivia's letter from the financial aid office arrived yesterday.
items.prompt_task_text: Olivia's letter from the financial aid office arrived yesterday.
items.answer: she wondered why the award amount had changed so much.

items.prompt: What did the dean announce about classroom attendance?
items.prompt_task_text: What did the dean announce about classroom attendance?
items.answer: graduate students will need to update their attendance records weekly.
